title: Love Me Like You Do
why_this_song: Love Me Like You Do by Ellie Goulding (2015) — selected for the English-through-music catalog. Use the sing-along prompts and exercises to drill pronunciation, vocabulary, and listening comprehension.

vocab_hooks.note: Appears 11 times; first heard in: "You're the only thing I wanna touch"
Appears 7 times; first heard in: "You're the light, you're the night"
Appears 7 times; first heard in: "What are you waiting for?"
Appears 3 times; first heard in: "'Cause I've never been so high"
Appears 2 times; first heard in: "Never knew that it could mean so much, so much"

teaching_notes_md:
## Teaching notes

- Times are estimated from community-synced lyrics and may be off by 1–2 seconds.
- Start with the sing-along prompt, then move to listen-and-fill.
- For B1+ students, focus on the discussion questions.
copyright_notice: Short fair-use lyric excerpts only (Brazilian Lei 9.610/98 art. 46 VIII). No full lyrics stored.

lines: Every inch of your skin is a holy grail I've got to find
Love me like you do, lo-lo-love me like you do (like you do)
Love me like you do, lo-lo-love me like you do
Touch me like you do, to-to-touch me like you do

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "touch" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "touch" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "you're" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "you're" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: Put these three lines in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: Coloque estes três versos na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: You're the light, you're the night
Let me take you past our satellites

exercises.prompt_en: If you could ask Ellie Goulding one question about "Love Me Like You Do", what would it be and why?
exercises.prompt_pt: Se você pudesse perguntar uma coisa para Ellie Goulding sobre "Love Me Like You Do", o que seria e por quê?

exercises.prompt_en: Rewrite the chorus of "Love Me Like You Do" in your own words — keep the meaning but change the style (formal, slang, poetic, whatever you like).
exercises.prompt_pt: Reescreva o refrão de "Love Me Like You Do" com suas palavras — mantenha o sentido mas mude o estilo (formal, gíria, poético, o que preferir).

exercises.prompt_en: If you had to summarize "Love Me Like You Do" in one sentence to someone who has never heard it, what would you say?
exercises.prompt_pt: Se você tivesse que resumir "Love Me Like You Do" em uma frase para alguém que nunca ouviu, o que diria?

exercises.prompt_en: Write the full form of each contraction:
exercises.prompt_pt: Escreva a forma completa de cada contração:
